description: Lock the glossator quality batch to Roman-law commentary scope without changing the dependency topology.

checks.reason: The batch preserves the century anchor for 11th- and 12th-century legal-school glossators.
Roman-law and civil-law texts remain textual legal context for glossators, not a required institution edge.
Scholasticism is retained only as dialectical-method context for harmonizing authoritative texts.
Written marginal and interlinear glosses remain part of the node scope, even though this batch does not otherwise revise the writing edge.
